title: carduus nutans subsp. platylepis
intro: Carduus nutans subsp. platylepis, also known as the wood betony or platylepis thistle, is a subspecies of the carduus nutans plant that belongs to the daisy family. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and astringent properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The medicinal properties of Carduus nutans subsp. platylepis include its ability to reduce fever, ease digestive issues, and calm the nervous system, offering potential health benefits such as improved immune function, reduced anxiety, and relief from respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used internally or applied topically to the affected areas, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
